parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ response: 'error', error: $json.error || 'Ошибка валидации', action: $json.action || null }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO auth_users (username, password_hash) VALUES ($1, crypt($2, gen_salt('bf', 12))) RETURNING id, username, created_at::text
SELECT id, username FROM auth_users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER($1) AND password_hash = crypt($2, password_hash)

INSERT INTO auth_sessions (token, user_id, expires_at, remember) VALUES (encode(gen_random_bytes(32), 'hex'), $1, to_timestamp($2 / 1000.0), $3) RETURNING token, user_id, expires_at::text;
UPDATE auth_users SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1;
DELETE FROM auth_sessions WHERE token = $1 RETURNING token

WITH upd AS (
  UPDATE auth_sessions SET last_used_at = NOW()
  WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW()
  RETURNING user_id
)
SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.display_name, u.is_admin
FROM upd JOIN auth_users u ON u.id = upd.user_id;

WITH upd AS (UPDATE auth_users SET password_hash = crypt($3, gen_salt('bf', 12)), password_changed_at = NOW() WHERE id = (SELECT user_id FROM auth_sessions WHERE token = $1 AND expires_at > NOW()) AND password_hash = crypt($2, password_hash) RETURNING id, username), _revoke AS (DELETE FROM auth_sessions WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM upd) AND token <> $1) SELECT id, username FROM upd

WITH existing AS (SELECT id FROM auth_users WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER($1) LIMIT 1),
upd AS (UPDATE auth_users SET display_name = COALESCE(NULLIF($2,''), display_name), last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM existing) RETURNING id, display_name),
ins AS (INSERT INTO auth_users (username, password_hash, display_name) SELECT LOWER($1), crypt(encode(gen_random_bytes(16),'hex'), gen_salt('bf', 8)), NULLIF($2,'') WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing) ON CONFLICT (username) DO UPDATE SET display_name = COALESCE(NULLIF($2,''), auth_users.display_name), last_login_at = NOW() RETURNING id, display_name)
SELECT id AS user_id, LOWER($1) AS username, display_name FROM upd
UNION ALL
SELECT id AS user_id, LOWER($1) AS username, display_name FROM ins;
